description: Minimal MCP servers — claude-forge v3.0 (4 servers). Full set: mcp-servers.optional.json

playwright.description: Headless browser automation (navigate, click, fill, screenshot, trace). Pinned to 0.0.70 (stable 2026-04-24); bump manually after audit.

context7.description: Real-time library documentation (React 19, Next.js 15, etc.) — use BEFORE writing library code. Pinned to 2.1.8 (stable 2026-04-24); bump manually after audit.

jina-reader.description: URL-to-markdown via Jina AI — token-efficient web content (fetch replacement). Pinned to 1.2.3 (stable 2026-04-24); bump manually after audit.

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol — Lighthouse audits, Core Web Vitals (LCP/INP/CLS), memory snapshots, network inspection. Complements playwright with quantitative perf/a11y diagnostics. Maintained by Google ChromeDevTools org (Apache-2.0, github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp) — NOT an Anthropic-official server. Version pinned to 0.23.0 (stable 2026-04-22); bump manually after audit.

_notes.why_4_servers: Minimal dependency for broad user compatibility. playwright = general browser automation. context7 = live library docs. jina-reader = token-efficient web fetch. chrome-devtools = quantitative perf/a11y audits (complements playwright, heavier but Lighthouse-grade). memory → Claude Code Auto Memory. exa → built-in WebSearch. github → gh CLI. fetch → jina-reader fallback.
_notes.add_more: See mcp-servers.optional.json for 5+ additional servers (memory, exa, github, fetch, time, sequential-thinking). Copy entries into this file and run: ./install.sh --upgrade
